title: Goober Goober SMP
description: A wonderfully optimized modpack made for streamer Crystal_3clipse's public SMP!
body:
A wonderfully optimized fabric 1.20 modpack made for streamer Crystal_3clipse's public SMP! 

This modpack features 62 mods, including Better Nether and Better End, and emphasizes building and exploration in a multiplayer environment!
The primary mods in this pack are Better Nether and Better End! Besides from those 2, this pack provides an enhanced vanilla experience. Not only does it run much smoother than vanilla minecraft due to the optomizations, it also provides enough new content to keep even the most experienced player occupied! 

Better Nether completely revamps the Nether- adding many more biomes, ores, and generally, more things to do! Better End does more of the same- with both packs adding new tools, blocks, structures, and mobs to explore. 

The World Generation is also much more intricate- adding structures, biomes, and much more to discover!

This modpack generally provides a much more smooth and interesting base game for multiplayer servers and long-time singleplayer worlds.
